missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: Workshop: Voice Acting for Japanese Anime
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Join us in voicing your favorite anime in Japanese! We'll learn vocal warmups and tips and tricks from professional voice actors before tackling the ultimate challenge: voicing short scenes together! Don’t worry about your Japanese language learning experience or level; everyone is welcome!

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: “Goodbye, Lara” Ep 1 Screening & Behind the Scenes Talk with Director Takushi Koide (Supported by Crunchyroll)
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Join our screen of the premiere episode of "Goodbye, Lara"! 200 years after dissolving into bubbles over a failed true love, Mermaid Princess Lara awakens in Lake Biwa. Following the show, enjoy an exclusive behind-the-scenes talk featuring the director, Takushi Koide! (Supported by Crunchyroll)

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: Umi Kyoku
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Umi Kyoku is a crazy whale shark VTuber, voice actor, and singer, here to help you find your peace within the current of the ocean. She's enjoyed swimming all over the world to perform at different conventions, such as DoKomi in Germany and AniManGaki in Malaysia. Despite being a virtual entertainer, that does not stop her from performing remotely across the globe to share her music and storytelling.

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: [U.S. PREMIERE] The Jaadugar: A Witch in Mongolia with Science SARU
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Join us for the grand U.S. premiere of Episodes 1 and 2, featuring special guests Executive Director Naoko Yamada, Director Abel Góngora (Science SARU), and more! Be the first to learn exclusive behind-the-scenes details exploring the series’ world, themes, and unique setting.

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: niccodilly
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Cosplay vocalist niccodilly is making her first appearance at Anime Expo as one of the most iconic anime bassist ---- Mio Akiyama from K-ON!. Featuring beloved anisongs and J-rock hits from the 2000s-2010s, get ready for a nostalgic anisong experience with live vocals, cosplay and bass guitar (!?)

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: "It's Anime" Time feat. Zeno Robinson & Caitlyn Elizabeth
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: A panel for the anime-dedicated FAST channel "Its Anime"! Please welcome Zeno Robinson and Caitlyn Elizabeth to dive deep into the appeal of their shows and their work as voice actors! We'll also be showing exclusive video and dropping some shocking news!!! If you love ANIME, VOICE-ACTORS and super cool GIVEAWAYS, you absolutely CANNOT miss this—come join the ultimate panel! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: BLACK TORCH Anime Premiere Panel
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Be the first to watch the BLACK TORCH Episode 1 subbed premiere presented by VIZ & Crunchyroll! Join special guests AJ Beckles (Jiro) and Keith Silverstein (Rago) for an exclusive screening, behind-the-scenes insights, and exciting giveaways as this supernatural action series ignites the stage.

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 — Welcome Back to Night City! (18+)
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Get ready for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2! This brand-new, standalone story will show an even more brutal, raw, and painfully human side of Night City, so join us live to hear directly from voice actors and creators of the series, and brace yourself for what’s to come. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: You Laugh You Leave: Live On Stage in Anime Expo!
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: An interactive anime comedy showdown at Anime Expo starring Jimmy Here, where voice actors and creators cosplay on stage while performers embody iconic shonen heroes, villains, and magical girls to make them laugh. Every laugh costs a life in this high-energy celebration of cosplay, fandom, and anime culture!

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: Solo Leveling: Karma - Expanding Universe
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Step into the story of the UNTOLD 27-YEAR WAR in SOLO LEVELING: KARMA. Get a first look at gameplay for this upcoming roguelite action RPG, featuring Aleks Le (voice of Sung Jinwoo), development insights, line readings, exclusive giveaways, surprise guests, and more!

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: JAST: A 30th Anniversary Retrospective Featuring Itaru-sensei (18+)
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Come listen to the folks at JAST talk about the Visual Novel industry, how it's changed over the years, and what it might look like going forward. With help (and live drawing!) from our special guest, Itaru Hinoue; founding member of Key, and artist behind Clannad, Air, and other works you love. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: Voices, Games, and IP: An Industry Talk with Jimmie Yamaguchi
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Learn more about the gaming and voice acting industry! Voice actor Jimmie Yamaguchi (Zenless Zone Zero, 2XKO, Star Wars) is joined by game industry veteran Chris Harada (Square Enix, Gearbox, and more) and Audrey, CEO of Japan-based Aitai Japan, to discuss how voices, games, and IP come together—from performance and production to global releases.

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: niccodilly
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Cosplay vocalist niccodilly is making her first appearance at Anime Expo as one of the most iconic anime bassist ---- Mio Akiyama from K-ON!. Featuring beloved anisongs and J-rock hits from the 2000s-2010s, get ready for a nostalgic anisong experience with live vocals, cosplay and bass guitar (!?)

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: Zenless Zone Zero - Signal Connect: Behind the Character
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Step into the world of Zenless Zone Zero at our special voice actor panel, where the voices behind this urban fantasy action RPG bring its fast-paced combat and stylish, story-driven city to life through behind-the-scenes stories, live interactions, and exclusive insights.

missingVoiceTagCandidates.title: Charity Auction at Anime Expo 2026
missingVoiceTagCandidates.description: Anime Expo works with our special guests from the industry to provide one-of-a-kind items for the annual Charity Auction. By participating in the Charity Auction you can do your part to support this years charitable cause: Los Angeles and Nagoya Sister City Affiliation (LANSCA).

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Workshop: Voice Acting for Japanese Anime
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Join us in voicing your favorite anime in Japanese! We'll learn vocal warmups and tips and tricks from professional voice actors before tackling the ultimate challenge: voicing short scenes together! Don’t worry about your Japanese language learning experience or level; everyone is welcome!

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: HEY! Is That An Anime Doll?
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: An anime looking doll? Have you seen those dolls that look like anime characters around the convention? Wanna know more about them? Then come to our panel where you can see them up close and hear more about the ball-jointed doll (BJD) community. And anyone who has a doll is welcome to join us too.

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Umi Kyoku
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Umi Kyoku is a crazy whale shark VTuber, voice actor, and singer, here to help you find your peace within the current of the ocean. She's enjoyed swimming all over the world to perform at different conventions, such as DoKomi in Germany and AniManGaki in Malaysia. Despite being a virtual entertainer, that does not stop her from performing remotely across the globe to share her music and storytelling.

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Chance to switch on with cosmosy
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Join cosmosy for a fun and interactive dance workshop where members will teach choreography from their hit songs. Learn signature moves step by step, dance along with the group, and experience the energy of cosmosy up close in this special Anime Expo session.

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Anime Expo Plushie Making Workshop Hosted by The Plushie Workshop
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Create your very own Plushumi The Plushie Workshop plushie at Anime Expo 2026! Choose between our adorable White Bear or Beige Bunny and bring your plushie to life through stuffing, assembly, and customization. You'll even get to see our signature knitting devices in action and try them yourself! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Cosmic Horror: Games, Anime, and Manga at the Edge of Reality
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: The term "cosmic horror" has taken the horror world by storm in recent years, but where did it come from? What does it truly mean? Join Angel Rose as she discusses the style, its origins, its effectiveness, and its prevalence in Japanese and inspired media. Bring your favorite examples!

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Monster Girls Rise with J18 Publishing and Kemonono★ (18+)
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Animal girls, monster girls, demihumans: no matter what you call them, they've never been more popular! Join the staff of J18 Publishing and Kemonono★ as they explore one of the biggest genres in modern hentai manga! (Kemonono★ will be live drawing during the panel, creating a brand-new original shikishi to give away—stick around for the Q&A!) ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Anime Trivia Night Broadcast (18+)
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Get ready for the most outrageous trivia show for the truly cultured anime fans. Watch and play along with 3 teams competing for points, knowledge and glory! Who will win and be crowned our "2026 Cultured Anime Fan" and who will be revealed as cringe? ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Neo Sanctum
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: We are Neo Sanctum and we are a Touhou doujin music circle based in Toronto, producing both Touhou and Anime EDM, with a focus on drum & bass! We love both organize and play events in Toronto and we will be bringing our sound live as DJs at AX for the first time!

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Mikan Project
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Mikan Project is an online collective of musicians delivering a zesty sound to the Western J-Music scene. They have performed at major industry events, notable ones being Anime Expo and Anime Boston. Online, their tight horn section is a go-to for Vocaloid producers, cover artists, as well as both indie and corporate VTubers; contributing to a wide range of projects spanning original compositions, anime, and video game music. Whether they’re in the studio, supporting the show, or taking center stage, Mikan Project brings a citrus fresh energy that leaves a lasting impression.

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: New Game+: An Anime Music Gameshow
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Congratulations, you’ve mastered anime OPs and EDs. You have unlocked New Game+. Questions you face will be more difficult, with extra modifiers like OSTs and mismatched anime openings. Come face the next challenge in anime music trivia.

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Let's Make A Cosplay Pattern!
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Join Kira and Ari of award-winning Kirari Cosplay for a fun, interactive workshop on making a basic cosplay pattern out of plastic wrap, masking tape, and sharpies! We'll walk you through the basics and help you make a basic pattern of your choice that you can take home with you!

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: niccodilly
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Cosplay vocalist niccodilly is making her first appearance at Anime Expo as one of the most iconic anime bassist ---- Mio Akiyama from K-ON!. Featuring beloved anisongs and J-rock hits from the 2000s-2010s, get ready for a nostalgic anisong experience with live vocals, cosplay and bass guitar (!?)

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Making Games is Hard Part 3: Featuring Aleks Le and Special Guest
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Rocket Panda Games returns with Volume 3 of its “Game Making” series, spotlighting Aleks Le and a special guest. Dive into an inside look at how the right voice can make or break a character, complete with live voice-over performances.

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: From Digital Manga to Anime: Inside C’moA Comics’ Latest Adaptations & Fan Screening
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Join C’moA Comics, one of Japan’s leading digital manga publishers, for an inside look at how digital titles become anime. Enjoy behind-the-scenes stories from recent adaptations and a fan screening of Episode 1 from "Pardon the intrusion, I'm Home!", plus prize opportunities for attendees. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Voice Acting Open Auditions with Bang Zoom! Studios
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Step up to the mic & take your shot at LIVE Voice Acting Open Auditions featuring auditions in front of our casting director, live anime dubbing on stage, and special industry & voice actor guests. Whether you’re trying out or cheering on, don’t miss the action! Follow @bangzoom for more details!

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: 15 Years and Beyond: Warner Bros. Japan Anime Production 15th Anniversary Panel with Upcoming Titles!
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Celebrate 15 years of Warner Bros. Japan Anime Production with STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure, Record of Ragnarok III, FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN, Devils' Crest, BLADE & BASTARD, special guests Laura Post & Damien Haas, latest updates, special giveaways, and more!

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Anime Expo Plushie Making Workshop Hosted by The Plushie Workshop

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: VIZ Anime Panel
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: VIZ presents a powerhouse anime showcase with special guests Masakazu Morita and Johnny Yong Bosch (BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War), AJ Beckles and Keith Silverstein (BLACK TORCH), sharing behind-the-scenes stories. Fans won’t want to miss exciting exclusive announcements revealed live!

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Cosplay Summer Camp!
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Ever wished you could go to a summer camp just for anime lovers? Well wish no more! In the second installment of Cosplay Summer Camp we’ll be making little crafts to swap with other people! As usual we’ll be adding a fun nerd-y twist to it, so be ready to laugh, have fun, and make new friends! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: From Page to Cosplay! How Black Girls Redefine Iconic Anime Characters
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Black girls are taking center stage in the cosplay world, bringing colors, culture, and confidence to characters that aren't always created with us in mind. For this panel, we will explore how Black cosplayers redefine iconic anime through a blend of creativity and cultural expression. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Early Idols & City Pop: Music of the Showa Era
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: A timeline of Japanese Pop music from the 60s-80s. Learn about the origins of Japanese Idols, the rise and fall of City Pop, hear 80s anime themes, and answer trivia questions for media prizes!
